intro: Seal the border. Stop the outbreak. Survive the chaos.
description:
In Quarantine Lockdown Simulator: Zombie Border, you take on the role of a border guard in a world overwhelmed by a zombie outbreak. You must manage the arrival of survivors and prevent the spread of infection beyond the quarantine zone, making quick and responsible decisions.
Every person crossing the border can pose a risk, and every choice can change the fate of your area. As the situation grows increasingly tense, you will learn to prioritize and act under constant pressure.

Key Features:
	•	Access control: Carefully inspect people arriving at the border for signs of infection.
	•	Health assessment: Analyze suspicious symptoms to protect the safe zone.
	•	Critical decisions: Allow passage, quarantine, or eliminate threats depending on the situation.
	•	Quarantine management: Monitor and cleanse the isolation area when zombies appear.
	•	Rapid defense: Use tactical methods to neutralize threats.
	•	Resource recovery: Rest between shifts to maintain alertness.

Prepare to be the last line of defense in a world devastated by zombies, where only vigilance and correct decisions can save lives.
